# Registry-Mind V1

Android 16 cognitive capture sensor (Oppo Find X9). Snap Key trigger → OCR → relay to OpenClaw desktop hub via ClawConnector.

## Key Documents

- [README.md](./README.md) — V1 overview and roadmap
- [USER-NOTES.md](./USER-NOTES.md) — Decisions, performance constraints
- [phase-1-repair.md](./phase-1-repair.md) — V1 implementation phases

## Stack

Kotlin 2.1 / Coroutines / ML Kit / Accessibility API / MediaProjection
